title: Inspect consumer capacity loss behind queue backlog
safe_investigation_steps: Inspect queue depth and the rate at which it is changing.
Compare consumer error rate with consumer throughput over the same interval.
Confirm whether a worker deployment version changed before capacity declined.
Review component-level dependency latency without assuming it is the root cause.
Record which verification facts remain unknown before treating a precedent as applicable.
unsafe_or_out_of_scope_actions: Do not restart consumers or alter queue configuration from this evidence packet.
Do not treat a historical match as proof of current root cause.
Do not select a remediation path when required verification facts are missing.
